loading.line2: where pets feel truly at home.

trust.label: Our Values
trust.title: Why people trust us
trust.subtitle: Every guest is part of our family

items.title: No Cages
items.desc: Your pet lives in a real home, not a kennel. Freedom of movement and a homely atmosphere are our core principles.

items.title: Daily Photos
items.desc: Every day you receive fresh photos of your pet. You always know what they're up to.

items.title: Daily Videos
items.desc: Video reports let you see your pet's mood, activity level, and social interactions.

items.title: Individual Care
items.desc: We learn each pet's habits, preferences, and personality. No one-size-fits-all approach.

items.title: Constant Supervision
items.desc: Pets are watched at all times. We're always present — day and night.

items.title: Home Atmosphere
items.desc: Soft beds, cozy corners, warm affection. Your pet will feel at home within the first few minutes.

gallery.label: Our Home
gallery.title: A place you'd want to stay
gallery.subtitle: Cozy rooms, soft beds, spacious yard

videos.label: Videos
videos.title: Real moments
videos.subtitle: See what a day looks like for our guests

items.title: Morning Walk
items.desc: Fresh air, new scents and the joy of movement.

items.title: Playtime
items.desc: Balls, toys, and happy wagging tails.

items.title: Afternoon Nap
items.desc: After an active morning — sweet rest.

items.title: Lunchtime
items.desc: Delicious meals — the secret to a happy pet.

items.title: Making Friends
items.desc: Meeting the other guests at our home.

items.title: Quiet Evening

guests.label: Our Guests
guests.title: Meet them
guests.subtitle: Each one has left a mark on our hearts

items.name: Bim
items.story: Bim arrived a little shy, but by the next morning he was running around the yard looking for new friends.

items.name: Luna
items.story: Luna is a true princess. She loves being the center of attention and adores affection.

items.name: Rex
items.story: Rex is smart and loyal. He settled in quickly and became the informal leader of the group.

items.name: Button
items.story: Tiny Button won everyone over with her energy. Small in size, but enormous in character.

items.name: Graf
items.story: Graf looks serious, but inside he's a gentle giant. Loves ear scratches more than anything.

items.name: Bim's Story
items.title: A shy pup became the life of the party
items.text: Bim came to us the first time very small and very scared. New place, unfamiliar smells, other dogs. We gave him time — just stayed close, didn't rush.
items.quote: By the second day he was running around the yard demanding a ball. His owner couldn't believe her eyes.
items.outcome: Now Bim is our most frequent guest ❤️

items.name: Luna's Story
items.title: A princess who found her throne
items.text: Luna arrived with a big bag: her favourite pillow, three toys and a supply of treats. Her owner was very worried. But Luna sorted it out herself.
items.quote: She chose the softest sofa, jumped on it, and looked at us as if she'd always lived here.
items.outcome: Luna now comes with every trip her owner takes 🌿

items.name: Rex's Story
items.title: A big dog with a big heart
items.text: Rex was brought for 10 days. His owner was sure such a serious dog would have a hard time. But Rex surprised everyone.
items.quote: On the third day he was already guarding our yard as if it were his own home. We call him our Head of Security.
items.outcome: Rex holds the record for most visits 🏆

reports.label: Photo Reports
reports.title: Daily Reports
reports.subtitle: You always know how your pet is doing

items.caption: Had a great walk today ❤️ Found a new path in the park.
Sleeping sweetly on her favourite sofa after the walk.
Great appetite! Finished every last bite.
Found a new best friend — they're inseparable now.
Smiling in his sleep. It was a full, happy day.
First day went wonderfully. Already settled right in.

items.author: Anna M.
items.text: Left my Luna for the first time and was very worried. But the daily photos and videos calmed me completely. Luna was so happy! We'll be back.

items.author: Dmitry K.
items.text: Rex is a serious dog, doesn't warm up to everyone. But here he accepted from the first minute. I can see from the videos — he's content, active. Very grateful for this approach.

items.author: Marina S.
items.text: Little Button found real friends here. Every time we drive there, she starts squealing with excitement in the car. Best place ever!

items.author: Igor V.
items.text: Went on a two-week business trip. Was sure my pet was stressed. But the reports showed the opposite! Thunder played, ate, walked. Huge thank you.

items.author: Olga R.
items.text: Nyusha is a cat and I worried the dogs would frighten her. Turns out they're in separate areas and it was perfect. Very professional approach.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most popular questions

items.a: Yes, we accept puppies from 3 months with basic vaccinations. We give them extra attention and patience, knowing this is a new and important experience for them.

items.q: Can I bring my pet's own food?
items.a: Of course! We recommend bringing your pet's usual food to avoid changing their diet. Just note the quantity and feeding schedule — we'll follow it precisely.
Yes, we accept cats. We have a separate cat area, isolated from dogs. A cozy, quiet and safe space where cats settle in quickly.
Yes, we work with dogs of all sizes. Our yard and space allows large breeds to feel comfortable. Every breed gets appropriate exercise and care.

items.q: What if my pet needs medication?
items.a: We're happy to help with scheduled medications. Just provide detailed instructions and leave the medication in its packaging — we'll administer it accurately and on time.
Vaccination passport, usual food, a favourite toy and their own pillow if possible. We have everything else — beds, bowls, toys. The main thing is a calm, happy pet.

items.q: How often do you send reports?
items.a: Every day. Morning message about how the night went, midday photos and videos of activities, evening recap. You're always in the loop and always at ease.

cta.title: We'd love to meet your furry friend ❤️
cta.subtitle: We understand how important it is to trust your pet to someone who truly loves animals. That's why every guest becomes part of our family.
